author: anon-a3997c17
content: Plan: finalize the staged migration changeset. Three cleanup items before commit: (1) stage the unstaged .gitignore fix that removes erroneous .claude/hooks/ and .claude/commands/ ignore entries added by crosslink init, (2) remove .crosslink/issues.db from .gitignore so it continues to be tracked (matching prior .chainlink/issues.db behavior per CLAUDE.md), (3) add .active-issue and .last-hydrated-ref to .crosslink/.gitignore as runtime files, then stage .crosslink/.gitignore and issues.db
